title: Evergreen Cannabis Apparel Capsule — Screen-Print Separation & Vector Production Package
one_line_ask: Turn the client's hand-painted hero graphic and brand logo into a production-ready, screen-print-separable vector + halftone package locked to the Evergreen purple/black/pink palette, plus an exported tech-pack mockup, bundled for the decorator.

issues: Slight softness to pixel edges (expected for raster source)
Very minor color cast to background (off-white, acceptable per brief)
Slight left-alignment offset — wordmark sits marginally left of true center
Background is off-white/cream rather than pure white — acceptable as source artifact for designer to correct
Font weight is very heavy which slightly reduces the condensed-serif character described, but remains a confident high-contrast serif
No visible paper grain or fiber texture — background appears smooth/digital rather than genuine watercolor paper
Minimal pigment pooling visible; brush texture is stylized rather than authentically hand-painted
Slight rotation is not clearly present — artwork appears nearly perfectly level, reducing scan realism
Warm/yellow scanner color cast is very subtle, borderline absent
Teal accents are present but minimal; magenta accents visible though sparse
Overall aesthetic reads more as digital illustration or clean vector-style render than genuine gouache-on-paper scan
No visible scan artifacts (dust, fiber, edge vignette) that would reinforce documentary scan realism

assets.name: evergreen_la_techpack_template.ai
assets.note: Client-provided .ai template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
